message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dmamove_finalize_pending' sets signal field 'move_desc.length', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=move_desc;field=length;offset=16] [oracle:assert=move_desc.length stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets length without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
